54038.title: Africa Avant Garde
54038.description: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

54066.title: Africa Avant Garde
54066.description: A look at some of the most influential living modern and contemporary artists as well as a visit to a museum which celebrates the best of contemporary African art.
